headline: How The Story Is Shifting For Automatic Data Processing (ADP) As Targets Reset And AI Grows
summary: Automatic Data Processing just saw its modeled fair value trimmed from US$271.40 to US$261.27, a cut of about 3.7% that puts the spotlight squarely on how the stock is being valued today. That move sits alongside Street research where some firms are lowering price targets by US$37 to US$48, while others are launching fresh bullish coverage. This combination gives you a mixed but useful read on sentiment. Read on to see what is driving these changes and how you can track the evolving narrative...

headline: AI Job-pocalypse: 5 million jobs at risk in new automated era
summary: Investing.com -- Artificial Intelligence is reshaping the U.S. labor market at a rapid clip, though early data suggests the transition is more balanced than many bearish forecasts originally assumed.
